---
title: "True Grit 8/4/2019"
startDate: "2019-08-04T00:00:00.000Z"
tripPlan: content/trip-plans/vesper-and-mile-high-club.mdx
destinations:
  - route: content/routes/true-grit.mdx
---

We camped after climbing Mile High Club the day before and got an early start, it was perfect! Sun was already on the wall well before we got there! It seems like the wall actually gets shaded around noon at this time of the year.

- 5:20 woke up
- 6:05 started
- 7:00 at base
- 7:30 started climbing
- 10:00 summit
- 10:30 both on summit
- 11:20 heading down
- 12:00 at tents
- 12:55 hiking down
- 3:40 car

## Approach

Hike the normal trail to Vesper, and at around 5,600 feet, spot a turnoff to the right.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7592-1024x683.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:611,&quot;y&quot;:1635},{&quot;x&quot;:837,&quot;y&quot;:1406},{&quot;x&quot;:883,&quot;y&quot;:1240},{&quot;x&quot;:1146,&quot;y&quot;:1142},{&quot;x&quot;:1193,&quot;y&quot;:1019},{&quot;x&quot;:1410,&quot;y&quot;:968},{&quot;x&quot;:1473,&quot;y&quot;:854},{&quot;x&quot;:1648,&quot;y&quot;:798},{&quot;x&quot;:1690,&quot;y&quot;:701},{&quot;x&quot;:1771,&quot;y&quot;:671},{&quot;x&quot;:1868,&quot;y&quot;:624},{&quot;x&quot;:2153,&quot;y&quot;:624},{&quot;x&quot;:2289,&quot;y&quot;:624}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:1945,&quot;y&quot;:616,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:2301,&quot;y&quot;:624,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7610-1024x683.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:1223,&quot;y&quot;:981,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:5,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;x&quot;:1253,&quot;y&quot;:870,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;Notch&quot;,&quot;ta&quot;:&quot;l&quot;,&quot;tb&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:5,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;x&quot;:416,&quot;y&quot;:599,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;Walk left behind here&quot;,&quot;ta&quot;:&quot;l&quot;,&quot;tb&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:2463,&quot;y&quot;:1737},{&quot;x&quot;:2930,&quot;y&quot;:1992},{&quot;x&quot;:2985,&quot;y&quot;:1881},{&quot;x&quot;:2837,&quot;y&quot;:1605},{&quot;x&quot;:2535,&quot;y&quot;:1431},{&quot;x&quot;:2255,&quot;y&quot;:1372},{&quot;x&quot;:1580,&quot;y&quot;:1214},{&quot;x&quot;:1193,&quot;y&quot;:985},{&quot;x&quot;:1040,&quot;y&quot;:926}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

You'll instantly get an epic view of the lake. Continue left along the heather ledges across some steep sections (hopefully no snow as long as you went late enough in the season).

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7614-1024x683.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7612-1024x683.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7618-683x1024.jpg)

After about 10 minutes, you'll find the 4th class 10 foot scramble to the belay ledge.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7617-1024x683.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:1822,&quot;y&quot;:1946},{&quot;x&quot;:1911,&quot;y&quot;:1658},{&quot;x&quot;:2098,&quot;y&quot;:1445},{&quot;x&quot;:2076,&quot;y&quot;:1208}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:2014,&quot;y&quot;:1041,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:5,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;x&quot;:2026,&quot;y&quot;:925,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;P1&quot;,&quot;ta&quot;:&quot;l&quot;,&quot;tb&quot;:false}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

## Pitch 1

I think pitch 1 officially actually goes up around the left side of where Alexis is in this photo, but this route also works. Ends at a bolted anchor.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7622-1024x683.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:1870,&quot;y&quot;:1055},{&quot;x&quot;:1594,&quot;y&quot;:1053},{&quot;x&quot;:1498,&quot;y&quot;:1057},{&quot;x&quot;:1352,&quot;y&quot;:1009},{&quot;x&quot;:1348,&quot;y&quot;:957},{&quot;x&quot;:1314,&quot;y&quot;:899},{&quot;x&quot;:1196,&quot;y&quot;:849},{&quot;x&quot;:1086,&quot;y&quot;:813},{&quot;x&quot;:928,&quot;y&quot;:787}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:866,&quot;y&quot;:767,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7624-1024x683.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7631-1024x683.jpg)

## Pitch 2

Up the chimney (or bypass by walking around the right), and then slabby bolted section finishing on a grassy ledge with another bolted anchor.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7630-1024x683.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:1416,&quot;y&quot;:1405,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:1434,&quot;y&quot;:1366},{&quot;x&quot;:1512,&quot;y&quot;:1258},{&quot;x&quot;:1638,&quot;y&quot;:1165},{&quot;x&quot;:1686,&quot;y&quot;:1084},{&quot;x&quot;:1677,&quot;y&quot;:937},{&quot;x&quot;:1791,&quot;y&quot;:790},{&quot;x&quot;:1893,&quot;y&quot;:709},{&quot;x&quot;:1863,&quot;y&quot;:625},{&quot;x&quot;:1860,&quot;y&quot;:511}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:1860,&quot;y&quot;:502,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:1920,&quot;y&quot;:688,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:1860,&quot;y&quot;:604,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

The start of the slabby bolted section

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7632-1024x683.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.4628571428571429,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:520,&quot;y&quot;:346,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

Then some heather steps to the belay ledge with the bolted anchor...

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7635-1024x683.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:1724,&quot;y&quot;:955,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7637-1024x683.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7638-1024x683.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7649-1024x683.jpg)

From this belay ledge, it seems like you could easily cross over to Ragged Edge

![Climber on Ragged Edge near the end of their P3 pitch, as seen from the P2 anchor](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7641-683x1024.jpg)

## Pitch 3

Another bolted slab with a reachy move just above the first bolt, then some trad section in the flakier pieces near the end up to another ledge for the bolted belay.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7659-1024x683.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:2093,&quot;y&quot;:690,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:556,&quot;y&quot;:1114,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:1154,&quot;y&quot;:893,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:1741,&quot;y&quot;:851,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:489,&quot;y&quot;:1573},{&quot;x&quot;:591,&quot;y&quot;:1126},{&quot;x&quot;:798,&quot;y&quot;:997},{&quot;x&quot;:1116,&quot;y&quot;:961},{&quot;x&quot;:1260,&quot;y&quot;:898},{&quot;x&quot;:1626,&quot;y&quot;:853},{&quot;x&quot;:1800,&quot;y&quot;:841},{&quot;x&quot;:1896,&quot;y&quot;:787},{&quot;x&quot;:1923,&quot;y&quot;:727},{&quot;x&quot;:2115,&quot;y&quot;:715},{&quot;x&quot;:2124,&quot;y&quot;:685}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7650-1024x683.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7652-1024x683.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7655-1024x683.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7662-1024x683.jpg)Liv leading P3
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7665-1024x683.jpg)

## Pitch 4

The crux finger crack pitch. It goes up one crack and then a bolt protects the traverse to the right crack, and continues up some more, to three more bolts and then the bolted anchor. I only used a 0.2 cam at the smallest, and quite a few nuts, I placed 12 pieces total including the bolts.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7666-1024x683.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:1213,&quot;y&quot;:672,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:1116,&quot;y&quot;:574,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:1078,&quot;y&quot;:544,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:1070,&quot;y&quot;:525,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:1115,&quot;y&quot;:519,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:1914,&quot;y&quot;:1393},{&quot;x&quot;:1674,&quot;y&quot;:1111},{&quot;x&quot;:1335,&quot;y&quot;:922},{&quot;x&quot;:1227,&quot;y&quot;:841},{&quot;x&quot;:1146,&quot;y&quot;:712},{&quot;x&quot;:1347,&quot;y&quot;:661},{&quot;x&quot;:1200,&quot;y&quot;:628},{&quot;x&quot;:1080,&quot;y&quot;:547},{&quot;x&quot;:1116,&quot;y&quot;:529}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

![From the top of P4, excellent views on the clean face!](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7707-Pano-1024x971.jpg)

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7670-1024x683.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7673-1024x683.jpg)

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7681-1024x683.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7696-1024x683.jpg)

## Pitch 5

All bolted! Like 5-6 bolts to the top including a piton, then sling a rock on the top and belay.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7704-1024x683.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:1979,&quot;y&quot;:1980},{&quot;x&quot;:2624,&quot;y&quot;:1526},{&quot;x&quot;:2947,&quot;y&quot;:1220},{&quot;x&quot;:2968,&quot;y&quot;:1063},{&quot;x&quot;:2730,&quot;y&quot;:889},{&quot;x&quot;:2433,&quot;y&quot;:800},{&quot;x&quot;:2166,&quot;y&quot;:711}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:1947,&quot;y&quot;:668},{&quot;x&quot;:1695,&quot;y&quot;:601},{&quot;x&quot;:1562,&quot;y&quot;:556}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:4.285714285714286,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:1536,&quot;y&quot;:542,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7718-1024x683.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7749-1024x683.jpg)
- ![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7756-1024x683.jpg)

## Summit

Prepare to be greeted by hikers at the summit! Gorgeous views.

![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2019/08/IMG_7789-Pano-1024x746.jpg)

## Descent

Take the hiking trail (class 3) back down!
